required_questions.gamma_failure_localization: Earlier failure localized mainly to Toy B branch-data/probe definition: the one-branch max task must contain M1> and M2>, not one active branch. Tree orientation now matches the paper list, and analytic warm starts pass.
required_questions.does_tree_multiplicity_causally_predict_: Supportive existing-data evidence, not final prospective proof. Tree-difference features improve grouped LOO beyond controls and edge-level features; matched high-low contrast is positive but uncertain.
required_questions.does_causal_result_support_phase2: Directionally yes, with remaining exact-matching caveats.
required_questions.next_exact_control_metric: Normalized same-root tree-difference comparison overlap, with normalized tree-level overlap and coordinate/load Gini as stratifiers; edge-level multiplicity only as baseline.
required_questions.claim_status_summary: Tree-space multiplicity and repaired analytic gamma are supported; edge-level multiplicity as sufficient is weakened; prospective exact-control and thermodynamic claims remain open.

claim_status.expressivity: Supported for the scoped first-order analytic toy cases and tree-sum formulation.
claim_status.trainability: Analytic warm starts optimize successfully; no large-family trainability law claimed.
claim_status.mechanism: Supported mechanism candidate is branch/projection/tree alignment with tree-difference input co-participation.
claim_status.causal_evidence: Supportive existing-data control; prospective exact-control training still required.
claim_status.thermodynamic_physics: Not tested; no thermodynamic claim supported.
